name: AgentFlow Incident Commander
summary: Helps teams coordinate incidents with structured response plans, updates, and timelines.
description: AgentFlow Incident Commander helps users run production or security incidents with less chaos. It structures impact, severity, response actions, owners, timelines, and stakeholder updates in a no-code workflow suitable for ChatGPT and AgentFlow.Directory.
use_cases: Create a timeline during an outage
conversation_starters: Help me run a SEV-1 incident for elevated 500s.
Turn this outage summary into an incident brief.
Draft a status update for leadership.
Create a response plan from this incident context.
limitations: Does not access logs or dashboards by itself
Does not replace on-call engineering judgment
Best suited for coordination, communication, and structure
